zh.lifeSummary: 當John Giffard於1301年4月出生在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德時，他的父親John Le Boef Giffard II26歲，母親Alexandra de Gardenis22歲。他於大約1325年與Lucy de Morteyn在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1369年1月25日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾特易福德享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 圖維爾聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Giffard于1301年4月出生在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德时，他的父亲John Le Boef Giffard II26岁，母亲Alexandra de Gardenis22岁。他于大约1325年与Lucy de Morteyn在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1369年1月25日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾特易福德享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 圖維爾聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Giffard was born in April 1301, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, John Le Boef Giffard II, was 26 and his mother, Alexandra de Gardenis, was 22. He married Lucy de Morteyn about 1325, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 January 1369, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in St Mary the Virgin's Church, Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Giffard est né en avril 1301, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John Le Boef Giffard II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alexandra de Gardenis, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lucy de Morteyn environ 1325, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1369, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary the Virgin's Church, Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Giffardが1301年4月にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで生まれた時，父John Le Boef Giffard IIは26歳，母Alexandra de Gardenisは22歳であった。約1325年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードでLucy de Morteynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1369年1月25日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエストン トゥルヴィルスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Giffard(이)가 1301년 4월 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Le Boef Giffard II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alexandra de Gardenis(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1325년 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 Lucy de Morteyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1369년 1월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 웨스턴 터르빌 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Giffard nasceu em abril de 1301, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Le Boef Giffard II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alexandra de Gardenis, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy de Morteyn aproximadamente 1325, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1369, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary the Virgin's Church, Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Giffard родился апрель 1301 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Le Boef Giffard II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alexandra de Gardenis, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy de Morteyn около 1325 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 января 1369 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, вестон турвилл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Giffard nació en abril de 1301, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Le Boef Giffard II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alexandra de Gardenis, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lucy de Morteyn aproximadamente 1325, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de enero de 1369, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary the Virgin's Church, Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
